name: io.github.nirholas/agent-sniper
title: Agent Sniper
description: Self-custodial pump.fun sniper: arm strategies, snipe, manage positions. Simulate by default.

packageArguments.description: Run the stdio MCP server face. The same binary also serves 'run' (trade loop), 'serve' (x402 API), 'arm', and 'status'.

environmentVariables.name: SNIPER_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Trade mode: simulate | live. simulate scores, guards, and logs every decision but NEVER broadcasts. live signs and broadcasts real transactions with real funds. Defaults to simulate — keep it there until your strategy is verified.

environmentVariables.name: SNIPER_NETWORK
environmentVariables.description: Solana cluster to trade on: mainnet | devnet. Defaults to mainnet.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Solana RPC endpoint. A public RPC rate-limits under the new-mint firehose, so live mode refuses to start without this set. Optional in simulate mode.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Default self-custody wallet secret for single-agent runs — base58, a JSON byte array, or 0x-hex. Stays on your machine; the engine signs locally. Required only for live trading. Treat it like a password.
